summary: INDO KIDZ website project with admin customization panel. Working on fixing the Customize tab visibility issue after login.
architectural_notes: Customize tab should only be visible to logged-in admin users (Internet Identity authentication)
known_issues: Customize tab not visible after admin login — needs fix in navigation visibility logic

existing_features.title: Fix the Customize tab (admin navigation button) in the Navbar so it becomes visible immediately after an admin user logs in with Internet Identity. The tab must reliably appear for admin users and remain hidden for non-admin or unauthenticated users.

Ensure the admin status check in Navbar.tsx correctly reads from the useIsAdmin query (or equivalent hook in useQueries.ts) and that the query is invalidated and refetched after login so the Customize tab appears reactively. Debug and fix any stale-query or timing issue that prevents the admin flag from being truthy after authentication.
